sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, value FLOAT, created_at DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
SELECT id, isfinite(value + 1.0) AS is_value_finite FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE date_intervals (start_date DATE, days_to_add INTEGER);
SELECT di.start_date, di.days_to_add, di.start_date + INTERVAL di.days_to_add DAY AS new_date FROM date_intervals di WHERE di.days_to_add IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, isfinite(t1.value * 0.1) AS finite_check, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_count FROM test_data t1 GROUP BY t1.id HAVING finite_check = TRUE;
SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN isfinite(value) THEN value ELSE 0 END) AS avg_finite_value FROM test_data WHERE created_at < DATE '2023-01-03';
SELECT di.start_date, isfinite((di.start_date + INTERVAL (COALESCE(di.days_to_add, 0) + 1) DAY)::FLOAT) AS is_new_date_finite FROM date_intervals di WHERE di.start_date IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_data SET value = NULL WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, COALESCE(isfinite(value), FALSE) AS finite_check FROM test_data;
